name: Wenatchee Applesauce Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). Grease 12 muffin cups.
2. In a bowl, combine dry ingredients and blend together.
3. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Remove from heat and stir in applesauce and milk until combined.
4. Beat egg in a separate bowl.
5. Stir the melted butter mixture into the dry ingredients.
6. Pour the beaten egg into the dry mixture and mix well.
7. Add the raisins to the batter and gently fold them in until just combined.
8. Divide the batter evenly among the prepared muffin cups.
9. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
10. Allow the muffins to stand in the tin for 5 minutes before removing them.
